description: Educational Python program demonstrating functional decomposition by planning a trip from Weatherford, Oklahoma to Las Vegas.

tasks.title: Create main program file
tasks.description: Create a Python file named vegas_trip_planner.py with a basic main() function and entry point.

tasks.title: Create greeting function
tasks.description: Write a function print_greeting() that prints a welcome message explaining the Vegas trip planner program.

tasks.title: Create function to ask number of travelers
tasks.description: Write ask_number_of_travelers() that prompts the user for the number of people traveling.

tasks.title: Create function to ask number of trip days
tasks.description: Write ask_trip_length_days() that asks the user how many days the trip will last.

tasks.title: Create function to ask travel method
tasks.description: Write ask_travel_method() that asks the user if they want to drive or fly.

tasks.title: Create function to ask driving distance
tasks.description: Write ask_driving_distance() that asks how many miles the trip is if traveling by car.

tasks.title: Create function to ask vehicle fuel efficiency
tasks.description: Write ask_vehicle_mpg() that asks the user for the miles per gallon of the vehicle.

tasks.title: Create function to ask fuel price
tasks.description: Write ask_fuel_price() that asks the user for the price of fuel per gallon.

tasks.title: Create function to calculate gallons needed
tasks.description: Write calculate_gallons_needed(distance, mpg) that computes total gallons needed for the trip.

tasks.title: Create function to calculate fuel cost
tasks.description: Write calculate_fuel_cost(gallons, fuel_price) that returns total fuel expense.

tasks.title: Create function to ask plane ticket price
tasks.description: Write ask_plane_ticket_price() that prompts the user for the cost of one plane ticket.

tasks.title: Create function to calculate flight cost
tasks.description: Write calculate_flight_cost(ticket_price, travelers) that calculates the total airfare cost.

tasks.title: Create function to ask hotel price per night
tasks.description: Write ask_hotel_price() that asks the user for the hotel price per night.

tasks.title: Create function to ask number of hotel rooms
tasks.description: Write ask_number_of_rooms() that asks the user how many hotel rooms are needed.

tasks.title: Create function to calculate lodging cost
tasks.description: Write calculate_lodging_cost(price_per_night, rooms, nights) that calculates the total hotel cost.

tasks.title: Create function to ask food cost per person per day
tasks.description: Write ask_food_cost_per_day() that asks the user how much each traveler expects to spend on food per day.

tasks.title: Create function to calculate food cost
tasks.description: Write calculate_food_cost(food_per_day, travelers, days) that returns total food spending.

tasks.title: Create function to ask entertainment budget
tasks.description: Write ask_entertainment_budget() that asks the user for the gambling and entertainment budget.

tasks.title: Create function to calculate transportation cost
tasks.description: Write calculate_transportation_cost(method, fuel_cost, flight_cost) that selects the correct cost depending on travel method.

tasks.title: Create function to calculate total trip cost
tasks.description: Write calculate_total_trip_cost(transport, lodging, food, entertainment) that returns the total cost of the trip.

tasks.title: Create function to calculate cost per person
tasks.description: Write calculate_cost_per_person(total_cost, travelers).

tasks.title: Create function to print trip summary
tasks.description: Write print_trip_summary(...) that displays the total trip cost and cost per traveler.

tasks.title: Create orchestrator function
tasks.description: Write plan_vegas_trip() that calls all helper functions in the correct order to gather inputs, perform calculations, and print results.

tasks.title: Call orchestrator from main
tasks.description: Update main() to call print_greeting() and plan_vegas_trip().
